CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT STDDEV_POP(value) FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value > 20.0);
SELECT id, STDDEV_POP(value) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS stddev_value FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, group_id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO additional_data (id, group_id, value) VALUES (1, 1, 15.0), (2, 1, 25.0), (3, 1, 35.0);
SELECT a.group_id, STDDEV_POP(a.value) FROM additional_data a JOIN test_data t ON a.id = t.id GROUP BY a.group_id;
SELECT SUM(value), STDDEV_POP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT value FROM additional_data) AS combined;
SELECT STDDEV_POP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered_data;
SELECT STDDEV_POP(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM additional_data)) AS subquery;
SELECT STDDEV_POP(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data) AS distinct_values;
SELECT id, STDDEV_POP(value) AS stddev_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) > 1;
